invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破2800（支撑位）或融资费率Z-Score降至50%以下（多头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 2800 (support) or funding rate Z-Score drops below 50% (long pressure eases).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.115（支撑位）或融资费率Z-Score升至20%以上（多头压力过高），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.115 (support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 20% (long pressure too high).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破86000（近期低点支撑）或融资费率Z-Score升至-50%以上（空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 86000 (recent low support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -50% (short pressure eases).
